Section Description: This Study Circle is designed for learners from non-IT backgrounds, as well as some learners from technical backgrounds, who want to build practical IT knowledge and skills in a supportive learning environment. Sessions will be held twice a week on weekends, and each session will usually last 2 to 3 hours. This form will help us understand your background, current engagement, interests, future plans, and expectations so that we can better design the syllabus and learning experience.
